title: jasminum sylvestre
intro: Jasminum sylvestre, also known as the Indian jasmine or star jasmine, is a species of flowering plant native to India and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating a range of health conditions. The health benefits of Jasminum sylvestre include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
